name: Team Tasks
description: Multi-agent pipeline coordination skill supporting Linear, DAG, and Debate modes for AI agent orchestration. Python stdlib-only with excellent documentation. First comprehensive orchestration infrastructure in the ProSkills catalog.
review: Robust multi-agent pipeline coordination skill supporting linear, DAG, and debate execution modes. Python stdlib-only dependency makes it highly portable and reliable. Excellent documentation and actively maintained. First comprehensive orchestration infrastructure in the catalog.

drax_results.notes: Python stdlib-only. Linear, DAG, and debate pipeline modes verified. Excellent documentation.
